mapper.select: select user_no, user_photo, user_created_date, user_lastest_login, user_email, user_password, user_tel, user_nickname, user_role, user_block, sns_no from user order by user_no asc
mapper.insert: insert into user ( user_created_date, user_email, user_password, user_tel, user_nickname, user_lastest_login) values (NOW(), #{userEmail}, #{userPassword}, #{userTel}, #{userNickname}, NOW())
mapper.select: select user_No, user_Email, user_Tel, user_NickName, user_Created_Date, user_Lastest_Login, user_role, user_Block, sns_No from user where user_no=#{userNo}
select user_No, user_Email from user where user_Email=#{userEmail} and user_password = #{userPassword}
select exists (select 1 from user where user_email = #{userEmail})
mapper.update: update user set user_lastest_login = NOW() where user_no = #{userNo}
